title: crepis aspera
intro: Crepis aspera, also known as Rough Hawk's Beard or Rough Hawkbit, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Crepis aspera include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Crepis aspera can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which are commonly used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
